title: Develop, implement and evaluate a pest control program in a food processing premises
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop, implement and evaluate a pest control program in a food processing premises demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Develop the pest management plan

pcs.text: Determine scope of the pest management plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine scope of the pest management plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine scope of the pest management plan.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document the activities and work instructions required to achieve the objectives.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify pest risks and control measures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm that food safety, animal welfare and environmental requirements are being followed in line with work instructions.
